SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2009 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-28-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER IS "DENIED". "SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE OF COURT 18.1, PROVIDES THAT SMALL CLAIMS CASES ARE HEARD BY A COMMISSIONER WITHOUT NEED FOR STIPULATION OR CONSENT OF THE PARTIES", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY SENT TO PARTIES.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,150.00 FILED BY FAZIO, BILL AS TO DEFENDANT JEW, EDMUND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-28-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAZIO, BILL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEW, EDMUND STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
"ANSWER" ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT JEW, EDMUND
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
